name: Ed Henning County Park
description: Ed Henning County Park is a place to play pickleball in Newaygo, MI. There are 6 outdoor hard and concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Fremont Community Recreation Authority
description: Fremont Community Recreation Authority is a place to play pickleball in Fremont, MI. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Fremont Rec Center
description: Fremont Rec Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Fremont, MI. There are 4 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.
